ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nonmetropolitan_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nonmetropolitan area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the nonmetropolitan area */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the nonmetropolitan area is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the nonmetropolitan area */,
  "area_size" REAL /* Size of the area in square kilometers */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the area belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nonmetropolitan_areas_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment data entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nonmetropolitan area */,
  "employment_total" INTEGER /* Total employment in the area */,
  "employment_per_thousand" REAL /* Employment per thousand jobs */,
  "location_quotient" REAL /* Location quotient indicating job concentration */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment category */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the employment data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES employment_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupation_types ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES nonmetropolitan_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wage_data" (
  "wage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wage data entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nonmetropolitan area */,
  "hourly_mean_wage" REAL /* Hourly mean wage in the area */,
  "annual_mean_wage" REAL /* Annual mean wage in the area */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment category */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the wage data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wage_data_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupation_types ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wage_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES employment_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wage_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES nonmetropolitan_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "total_area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment category */,
  "average_employment" INTEGER /* Average employment in this category across all areas */,
  "median_wage" REAL /* Median wage in this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupation_types" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "average_employment" INTEGER /* Average employment in this occupation across all areas */,
  "median_wage" REAL /* Median wage for this occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nonmetropolitan area */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "employment_total" INTEGER /* Total employment for the given year */,
  "hourly_mean_wage" REAL /* Mean hourly wage for the given year */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment category */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation type */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupation_types ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES employment_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES nonmetropolitan_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nonmetropolitan area */,
  "trend_year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "employment_change" REAL /* Change in employment compared to the previous year */,
  "wage_change" REAL /* Change in mean wage compared to the previous year */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment category */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation type */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_trends_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupation_types ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_trends_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES employment_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_trends_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES nonmetropolitan_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Additional permissions or roles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "data_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the data included in the report */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment category */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the report was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES employment_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupation_types ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Date and time feedback was submitted */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment category */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation type */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the resolution of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES employment_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupation_types ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
